hello: Hey there! 👋 I'm AI Code CLI — your terminal-based AI assistant. Ask me anything!
hi: Hi! Ready to help you code, think, or explore. What's on your mind?
who are you: I'm AI Code CLI, a futuristic terminal assistant powered by a local brain. Type anything and I'll do my best to help.
what can you do: I can answer questions, help with code concepts, explain things, and more — all from the comfort of your terminal. Try asking me about Python, web dev, or just say hello!
help:
Available commands:
  exit       → Quit the application
  /clear     → Clear chat history
  hello/hi   → Greet me
  who are you → Learn about me
  what can you do → See my capabilities
python: Python is a high-level, interpreted language loved for its readability and versatility. It powers web backends, data science, AI/ML, automation, and more. What aspect of Python interests you?
javascript: JavaScript is the language of the web — runs in browsers and on servers (Node.js). It's event-driven, prototype-based, and essential for frontend development. Want to know more?
what is ai: AI (Artificial Intelligence) refers to systems that simulate human intelligence — learning, reasoning, problem-solving. Modern AI uses techniques like machine learning and neural networks to achieve remarkable things.
how are you: I'm running at full speed — circuits humming, weights loaded, ready to assist. How about you?
bye: Goodbye! Type 'exit' to close the terminal. See you next time! 👋
thanks: You're welcome! Happy to help anytime. 🚀
thank you: No problem at all! That's what I'm here for. 💻
what is your name: I go by AI Code CLI — your local terminal intelligence. No cloud needed, no latency. Just pure local brain power.
version: AI Code CLI v1.0.0 — Built with Python, prompt_toolkit, rich, and pyfiglet. Running on brain.json v1.
author: Crafted with care for terminal lovers who appreciate a clean, futuristic CLI experience.
flask: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework — minimal, flexible, and great for building APIs and web apps fast. Need help with routes, templates, or something else?
react: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces using a component-based architecture. Created by Meta, it powers countless modern web apps.
css: CSS (Cascading Style Sheets) controls the visual presentation of web pages. Modern CSS supports variables, grid, flexbox, animations, and much more.
html: HTML (HyperText Markup Language) is the skeleton of every web page — it defines structure and content. HTML5 brought semantic elements, audio/video, canvas, and more.
api: An API (Application Programming Interface) is a contract between software components — it defines how they communicate. REST, GraphQL, and WebSockets are popular API styles.
database: Databases store and organize data. Common types include relational (PostgreSQL, MySQL), document (MongoDB), key-value (Redis), and graph databases. What are you building?
git: Git is a distributed version control system. Key commands: git init, git add, git commit, git push, git pull, git branch, git merge. Need a quick reference?
linux: Linux is the backbone of servers, containers, and developer machines worldwide. Powerful, open-source, and endlessly customizable. A terminal lover's dream OS.
terminal: You're already in one! The terminal is the most powerful interface for a developer — direct access to your OS, scripting, automation, and beyond.
code: Writing clean, readable, well-structured code is an art. Consistency, meaningful names, small functions, and good comments go a long way. What are you coding today?
